description: Evening tendency: inverse of the morning commute, with higher departures from central/hub stations and higher arrivals toward outer stations. Weights are doubles normalized so arrivalWeight and departureWeight each sum to 1.0. Multiply by 100 to read as percentages.

stations.name: Avenue du Président Kennedy Maison de Radio France
Pont du Garigliano - Hôpital Européen G. Pompidou
